verification_gate: Proof schema validates; executor and verifier authority are distinct; append-only lineage, checksums, rollback points, and failed checks are preserved.
proof_summary: Proof-record schema validates with result enum {pass,fail} preserving failed checks. The append-only ledger is monotonically sequenced and SHA-256-backed, and the shipped authority integrity report (result=pass) proves the verifier agent (agent.verifier) is distinct from the executor (agent.executor) — proof, not assertion, is the sole completion authority.

live_commands.purpose: Validate examples against schemas, checksum spine docs 00..09, and evaluate this task's gate
